message:
I am thinking...: I have already created the core files for the restaurant management application as per the scratchpad. The user's last message indicates that the initial batch of files (package.json, tsconfig.json, next.config.js, prisma/schema.prisma, src/app/globals.css, src/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts) has been successfully created.

I need to continue with the remaining files as planned in the scratchpad:
- src/app/layout.tsx
- src/app/page.tsx
- src/app/api/restaurants/route.ts
- src/app/api/menu/route.ts
- src/app/api/orders/route.ts
- src/app/dashboard/page.tsx
- src/app/auth/login/page.tsx
- src/app/auth/register/page.tsx
- src/components/Navbar.tsx
- src/components/RestaurantCard.tsx
- src/components/MenuItemForm.tsx
- src/components/OrderTable.tsx
- src/middleware.ts
- .env.example

I will proceed by creating these files in batches. I'll start with the next batch: src/app/layout.tsx, src/app/page.tsx, src/app/api/restaurants/route.ts, src/app/api/menu/route.ts.
